rationale: Updated Claude profile classification to use runtime_id=claude_code and provider_id=anthropic instead of requiring the claude_anthropic profile_id.
Changed default Claude credential actions so API-key enrollment is available for Claude Anthropic profiles by default and OAuth connect is added when OAuth volume metadata exists.
Preserved OAuth switching and lifecycle actions after API-key commit when OAuth volume metadata exists, while keeping API-key materialization as secret_ref/api_key_env.
Top-level review summary; the actionable inline findings from this review were addressed individually.
Automated review wrapper without separate actionable feedback.
Changed auth_actions parsing to distinguish missing metadata from explicit empty metadata, so auth_actions: [] intentionally suppresses fallback actions.
Replaced Claude lifecycle success no-ops with API calls and added backend validate/disconnect endpoints plus tests.
